yarn run v1.22.22
$ elm-test --report=junit > result-junit.xml
-- TYPE MISMATCH - /workspace/elm-tests/source/front/tests/App/Feature/FeatureTest.elm

Something is off with the body of the `ctx` definition:

45|>    { appVersionSHA = "SHA"
46|>    , baseURL = ""
47|>    , currentKey = ""
48|>    , language = "fr_FR"
49|>    , themes = themes
50|>    }

The body is a record of type:

    { appVersionSHA : String
    , baseURL : String
    , currentKey : String
    , language : String
    , themes : Model.ThemePool
    }

But the type annotation on `ctx` says it should be:

    Update.UpdateContext

Hint: Looks like the page field is missing.

`elm make` failed with exit code 1.
error Command failed with exit code 1.
info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
